data.id: TR-PICUS-EXEC-001: WMI Remote Code Execution via Invoke-WmiMethod
data.name: TR-PICUS-EXEC-001: WMI Remote Code Execution via Invoke-WmiMethod
data.description: Detects PowerShell execution of Invoke-WmiMethod cmdlet, which can be used for remote code execution and lateral movement. Attackers use this to execute arbitrary commands on local or remote systems via WMI classes. MITRE T1047.
data.contents: (process.name contains 'powershell.exe' OR process.name contains 'pwsh.exe') AND (process.command_line contains 'Invoke-WmiMethod' OR process.command_line contains 'wmiexec' OR process.command_line contains 'wmi' AND process.command_line contains 'Process.Create') AND process.modules contains 'wmiprvse.dll'
